creator: brueffer@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi Joe, sorry this PR was ignored for so long.  bktr was connected to the module build 
on amd64 with r230303 two years ago, so it was indeed missing in 8.2-RELEASE.  I'm 
not sure why compiling it into the kernel didn't work for you, but it does build on 
FreeBSD 10 (and I'm pretty sure on 9 as well). 

Thanks for the contribution!
